/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libdobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/dobot_interface/action/joint_ptp__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/dobot_interface/action/pose_ptp__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dobot_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/dobot_interface/srv/pick_and_place__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/d/Curtin_Colombo/year_3/sem_1/mxen3005/assignment/mxen_ws/build/dobot_interface:/opt/ros/kilted/lib: libdobot_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/kilted/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/kilted/lib
